mapper.insert: INSERT INTO treatments ( designer_id, customer_id, treatment_date, treatment_time, category, style_name, detail ) VALUES ( #{designerId}, #{customerId}, #{treatmentDate}, #{treatmentTime}, #{category}, #{styleName}, #{detail} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, designer_id, customer_id, treatment_date, treatment_time, category, style_name, detail, created_at, updated_at FROM treatments WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND designer_id = #{designerId} ORDER BY treatment_date DESC, treatment_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, designer_id, customer_id, treatment_date, treatment_time, category, style_name, detail, created_at, updated_at FROM treatments WHERE id = #{treatmentId} AND designer_id = #{designerId}
